text: There is a quiet, studious energy here. The clean and modern design, accentuated by the reflections and orderly seating, invites contemplation. Upon seeing the "R+D" wall and the displays about human-machine interaction, I feel curiosity and an urge to explore how knowledge and innovation unfold in such environments. Within these silent halls, I sense the weight of collective inquiry and the promise of discovery, yet I wonder if the mechanical whir of innovation drowns out subtler, more human questions.
